parameters.query: SELECT up.*, u.first_name, u.telegram_id FROM user_profiles up JOIN users u ON u.id = up.user_id WHERE up.user_id = $1
SELECT * FROM goals WHERE user_id = $1 AND is_active = true LIMIT 1
SELECT weight_kg, logged_at FROM weight_logs WHERE user_id = $1 ORDER BY logged_at DESC LIMIT 8
